function.name: get_historical_weather
function.description: Get historical weather for a city on a specific date.
function.long_description: Retrieves historical daily weather summary including min/max/average temperature, precipitation, and weather code for a specified city and date using an external weather API.

city.description: Name of the city to get historical weather for

example_user_queries: Get historical weather for London on 2025-01-15.
What was the weather in New York on 2024-07-04?
Fetch past weather data for Tokyo on 2023-12-25.
Show historical weather for Sydney on 2025-03-10.
Tell me the weather in Dubai on 2024-11-01.
Look up historical weather for Toronto on 2025-08-20.
Get weather history for Paris on 2023-05-14.
What were the weather conditions in Mumbai on 2024-09-30?
Fetch the historical weather for Singapore on 2025-02-01.
Get_historical_weather with city Berlin and date 2024-06-18.
